74.reason: [The problem requires traversal to always start from vertex 0, but this loop starts from the smallest unvisited vertex (which could be non-zero after deletion). Also, after deletion, the graph is still connected and must start from 0, but if 0 is not deleted (as per problem), we should only start from 0, not loop over all vertices. This causes incorrect traversal order when the graph is connected (which it always is).]

99.reason: [Incorrect indexing: should be quene[Front] then increment Front. Current code uses 1-based indexing for a 0-based array. When Front=0, it accesses quene[1], skipping quene[0]. This causes wrong BFS order and potential out-of-bounds if queue is full.]
